title: dolichos brunellii
intro: Dolichos brunellii, also known as the Indian cluster bean, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family, characterized by its small, white or yellowish flowers and edible pods. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dolichos brunellii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion. Dolichos brunellii is often prepared as a herbal tea, or used in traditional medicine to make tonics and decoctions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
